content: Agricultural commodity prices are highly sensitive to weather patterns, particularly El Nino-Southern Oscillation (ENSO) cycles. El Nino typically brings drought to Australia, Southeast Asia, and Southern Africa while increasing rainfall in the Americas. La Nina reverses these patterns. Major crops affected include wheat (temperature-sensitive during flowering), corn (water needs during pollination), and soybeans (growing season rainfall critical).
source: USDA World Agricultural Supply and Demand Estimates
